User task:

Theorem title: Reduced Glassey blow-up argument

Target node:

{
  "id": "n1_refined_local_claim",
  "title": "Local estimate",
  "informal_statement": "\\[\nM^2\\le \\frac{2}{d}\\,\\|xu(t)\\|_{L^2}\\,\\|\\nabla u(t)\\|_{L^2}.\n\\]",
  "informal_proof_text": "Apply the assumed inequality\n\\[\n\\|f\\|_{L^2(\\mathbb{R}^d)}^2\\le \\frac{2}{d}\\,\\|xf\\|_{L^2(\\mathbb{R}^d)}\\,\\|\\nabla f\\|_{L^2(\\mathbb{R}^d)}\n\\]\nwith \\(f=u(t)\\). Mass conservation gives \\(\\|u(t)\\|_{L^2}=M\\), so\n\\[\nM^2\\le \\frac{2}{d}\\,\\|xu(t)\\|_{L^2}\\,\\|\\nabla u(t)\\|_{L^2}.\n\\]\nBy definition of the variance,\n\\[\n\\|xu(t)\\|_{L^2(\\mathbb{R}^d)}^2=V(t),\n\\]\nhence \\(\\|xu(t)\\|_{L^2}=\\sqrt{V(t)}\\), yielding the claim.",
  "formalization_priority": 1,
  "formalization_rationale": "Smaller concrete local consequence extracted because it is more directly formalizable than the broader surrounding node."
}

Immediate parent summary:
{
  "id": "n0",
  "title": "Finite-time blow-up from the virial identity",
  "informal_statement": "There exists \\(T<\\infty\\) such that \\(\\|\\nabla u(t)\\|_{L^2(\\mathbb{R}^d)}\\to\\infty\\) as \\(t\\uparrow T\\)."
}

import Mathlib.Data.Real.Basic

namespace FormalIslands

theorem reduced_glassey_local_estimate
    {d : ℕ} {M xu_norm grad_norm uL2_norm : ℝ}
    (hweighted : uL2_norm ^ 2 ≤ ((2 : ℝ) / d) * xu_norm * grad_norm)
    (hmass : uL2_norm = M) :
    M ^ 2 ≤ ((2 : ℝ) / d) * xu_norm * grad_norm := by
  simpa [hmass] using hweighted

end FormalIslands

import Mathlib.Data.Real.Sqrt

theorem reduced_glassey_mass_variance_bound
    {d M Vt uL2 xuL2 gradL2 : ℝ}
    (hweighted : uL2 ^ 2 ≤ (2 / d) * xuL2 * gradL2)
    (hmass : uL2 = M)
    (hvariance : xuL2 ^ 2 = Vt)
    (hxu_nonneg : 0 ≤ xuL2) :
    M ^ 2 ≤ (2 / d) * Real.sqrt Vt * gradL2 := by
  have hxu : xuL2 = Real.sqrt Vt := by
    rw [← hvariance, Real.sqrt_sq_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg hxu_nonneg]
  calc
    M ^ 2 = uL2 ^ 2 := by rw [← hmass]
    _ ≤ (2 / d) * xuL2 * gradL2 := hweighted
    _ = (2 / d) * Real.sqrt Vt * gradL2 := by rw [hxu]
 succeeded in 0ms:

+
+theorem reduced_glassey_local_estimate
